result.summary: All 18 responsive E2E tests passed across chromium, firefox, and webkit (6 viewports each: iphone-se, iphone-11, ipad, ipad-land, laptop, desktop). No horizontal overflow, no fatal console errors, hero heading visible across all viewports. Run completed in ~35.6s against production server on port 3200.
